summary: This is a brief placeholder post directing readers to Cathy O'Neil's Bloomberg View column about the robot apocalypse. She also mentions an upcoming recap of her TED experience. The actual substantive content lives in the linked Bloomberg article rather than this blog post.
key_points: O'Neil recently spoke at TED and plans to share that experience
She published a column at Bloomberg View about AI and automation concerns
The post serves primarily as a cross-promotion to her mainstream media writing
key_insight: This post is a brief redirect to O'Neil's Bloomberg column on AI risks rather than containing original analysis.
